--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Goblin — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Goblin — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Goblin — Winged Striker HP: 48/67

--- Goblin — Winged Striker --- HP: 48/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
